LAW AND MOTION, 302, PLAINTIFFS JEFF HORD, LISA HORD, AND G H'S MOTUON TO SEAL AS CONFIDENTIAL PORTION OF APPLICATION AND ORDER FOR APPOINTMENT OF GUARDIAN AD LITEM. OFF CALENDAR. PLAINTIFF DID NOT SERVE AND FILE THE MOTION AT LEAST 16 COURT DAYS BEFORE THE HEARING DATE, AS REQUIRED BY CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTION 1005(B). IN ADDITION, A PETITION FOR APPOINTMENT OF A GUARDIAN AD LITEM MUST BE SUBMITTED TO DEPT. 206, THE PRESIDING JUDGE'S DEPARTMENT. (SEE SF LOCAL RULE 6.9(A).) THE MOTION TO SEAL A PORTION OF THAT APPLICATION LIKEWISE SHOULD BE NOTICED AND HEARD IN DEPT. 206. JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN, CLERK: S. LE, NOT REPORTED. =(302/EPS)

LAW AND MOTION, 302, PLAINTIFFS JEFF HORD, LISA HORD, AND G H'S MOTION TO SEAL AS CONFIDENTIAL PORTION OF COMPLAINT AND OF SOME SUPPORTING DECLARATIONS TO THIS MOTION IS OFF CALENDAR. PLAINTIFF DID NOT SERVE AND FILE THE MOTION AT LEAST 16 COURT DAYS BEFORE THE HEARING DATE, AS REQUIRED BY CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTION 1005(B). IF DEFENDANT DOES NOT OBJECT TO PLAINTIFF SEALING PORTIONS OF THE COMPLAINT AND OF CERTAIN SUPPORTING DECLARATIONS, THE PARTIES SHOULD SUBMIT A STIPULATION AND PROPOSED ORDER RECITING THE FINDINGS REQUIRED BY CAL. R. CT. 2.551 AND SPECIFYING THE PORTIONS OF THE COMPLAINT AND DECLARATIONS TO BE SEALED. JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN, CLERK: S. LE, NOT REPORTED. =(302/EPS)

MOTION To Seal As Confidential Portion Of Complaint And Of Some Supporting Declarations To This Motion ***Unredacted***
Off Calendar Nov-12-2020 Off Calendar

MOTION To Seal As Confidential Portion Of Application And Order For Appointment Of Guardian Ad Litem
Off Calendar Nov-12-2020 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFFS JEFF HORD, LISA HORD, AND G H's Motuon To Seal As Confidential Portion Of Application And Order For Appointment Of Guardian Ad Litem.

Off calendar. Plaintiff did not serve and file the motion at least 16 court days before the hearing date, as required by Code of Civil Procedure section 1005(b). In addition, a petition for appointment of a guardian ad litem must be submitted to Dept. 206, the Presiding Judge's department. (See SF Local Rule 6.9(A).) The motion to seal a portion of that application likewise should be noticed and heard in Dept. 206.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. =(302/EPS)
